Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein mentally notes that he recently advanced and has yet to completely digest the Seer potion.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a focused expression, often tinkering with Victorian clockwork parts, wearing a simple linen blouse and a dark work apron.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Added specific details about her mechanical hobbies and her reaction to the Shauds' traditionalist views.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag; brown eyes fixed in a habitual expression of calm exasperation toward her brothers

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks a scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: literate, employed at an import and export company, resourceful and calculating — negotiated gas pipe installation to avoid debt
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentions his weekly salary (1 pound 10 soli) and his goal to study accountancy and grammar.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat

Angelica.hair_style: long hair coiled in a mature, elegant style
Angelica.visual_anchor: mature and elegant woman with brownish-yellow long hair coiled, wearing a Victorian attendant's outfit
Angelica.distinguishing_features: Develops a subtle, unknown fear of Klein Moretti due to his accurate divinations.
Angelica.role: Receptionist and staff member of the Tingen Divination Club
Angelica.source_notes: Explicitly described in the text as a 'beautiful brunette'.

Hanass Vincent.hair_style: thick and hard brown hair, each strand standing firmly like porcupine spikes
Hanass Vincent.face_description: middle-aged face with prominent dark circles under the eyes
Hanass Vincent.visual_anchor: middle-aged man with spiky brown hair like porcupine spikes and deep dark circles, wearing a black classic Victorian robe
Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white
Hanass Vincent.distinguishing_features: thick Awwa accent, dark red aura (worried)
Hanass Vincent.accessories: Silver-coated mirror used for magic mirror divination
Hanass Vincent.source_notes: Physical appearance, clothing, and accent confirmed during the divination class.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: frail male with soft blond hair and a monocle hanging over a formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: Described as 'reading some information on the table with his monocle'.
Glacis.era_clothing_lock: formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie, monocle hanging from a chain, polished leather shoes

Lawson Darkwade.unique_identifier: carries small glass medicine vials in his pockets
Lawson Darkwade.era_clothing_lock: well-worn brown tweed waistcoat over a slightly stained white cotton shirt, dark wool trousers, and a sturdy leather apron
Lawson Darkwade.face_description: ordinary facial features with a slightly tired expression, soft jawline, and observant eyes
Lawson Darkwade.visual_anchor: mid-30s male with ordinary features and a tired expression, carrying small glass medicine vials in his pockets, wearing a well-worn brown tweed waistcoat over a slightly stained white cotton shirt and a sturdy leather apron
Lawson Darkwade.color_palette: earthy brown, faded white, dark grey, leather brown
Lawson Darkwade.source_notes: Mentioned as an apothecary who runs Lawson's Folk Herb Store. Visuals are guessed based on his profession.

Lanevus.unique_identifier: charismatic and persuasive smile, always carries formal business documents
Lanevus.era_clothing_lock: sharp navy-blue double-breasted frock coat, crisp white cravat, tailored charcoal trousers, and polished black Oxford shoes
Lanevus.face_description: handsome, trustworthy-looking face with a sharp angular jawline, straight nose, and bright persuasive eyes
Lanevus.visual_anchor: early 30s handsome fair-skinned male with neatly combed blond hair and a charismatic smile, always carrying formal business documents, wearing a sharp navy-blue double-breasted frock coat and crisp white cravat
Lanevus.color_palette: navy blue, stark white, charcoal grey, polished black
Lanevus.source_notes: Mentioned as a businessman offering a massive investment opportunity (implied to be a scam). Visuals guessed to fit a charismatic fraudster.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Captain of the Black King, known as the Son of the Steam.
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Diary reveals he was born in Intis Kingdom, sailed the Black King, chose the Savant pathway, and was called Son of the Steam.

Sir Deweyville.primary_clothing: High-end black frock coat, stiff white wing-collar shirt, and a silk cravat
Sir Deweyville.face_description: Distinguished and refined features with a high brow and a stern yet idealistic philanthropic expression.
Sir Deweyville.visual_anchor: elderly distinguished gentleman in a high-end black frock coat and silk cravat, with a look of a wealthy Victorian philanthropist
Sir Deweyville.color_palette: charcoal black, silk white, navy blue
Sir Deweyville.distinguishing_features: Founder of Deweyville Trust; provides cheap housing; incredibly wealthy (doesn't know exact count of 300+ pounds).
Sir Deweyville.source_notes: Mentions his logo and his reputation for providing cheap housing.
Sir Deweyville.unique_identifier: crest of a white dove spreading its wings on a light-blue background (Deweyville Trust logo)
